message:
chore: Clippy cast_lossless fixes in conformal tests

Replace `i as f64` with `f64::from(i)` and `count as f64` with
`f64::from(count)` throughout the conformal calibration test suite.

The `as` casts were on i32/u32 loop counters and counters where
`From<i32>` is lossless; the explicit `f64::from()` conversion is
clearer about intent and silences the `cast_lossless` lint.

Affected test functions (existing tests, no behavioral change):
- health_threshold_detects_anomaly
- health_threshold_upper_vs_lower
- health_threshold_adapts_with_new_data
- health_threshold_tracks_coverage
- health_threshold_multiple_metrics
- health_threshold_any_anomalous
- health_threshold_check_result_format
- health_threshold_result_display

Affected test functions (bd-npn8e observability tests):
- obs_conformal_coverage_guarantee_holds
- obs_health_threshold_coverage_guarantee_holds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
